text:
The following merged pull requests close Linear issues that are not in 'done' state:

- PR #1009 closes ENG-183
- PR #1010 closes ENG-130
- PR #1022 closes ENG-183
- PR #1026 closes ENG-153
- PR #1030 closes ENG-120
- PR #1040 closes ENG-136
- PR #1042 closes ENG-135
- PR #1050 closes ENG-203
- PR #1053 closes ENG-215
- PR #1057 closes ENG-143
- PR #1058 closes ENG-104
- PR #1069 closes ENG-113
- PR #1078 closes ENG-132

Total count: 13.

tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT pr.number, pr.closes_linear FROM github_pull_requests pr JOIN linear_issues li ON pr.closes_linear = li.id WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND li.state != 'done'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT pr.number, pr.closes_linear, COUNT(*) OVER() as total_count FROM github_pull_requests pr JOIN linear_issues li ON pr.closes_linear = li.id WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND li.state != 'done'"}
